headline: How The Cboe (CBOE) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Products And Refined Targets
summary: Cboe Global Markets is back in focus after its fair value estimate was nudged from US$286.08 to US$287.92 per share, a modest adjustment that still matters if you are tracking the stock closely. Recent analyst updates, with some lifting price targets by US$5 to US$23 and at least one trimming a target from US$302 to US$295, show a mix of optimism and caution around where the shares could reasonably trade. Read on to see how these shifting targets fit into the broader narrative and how you can...

headline: 3 Important Reminders for Investors When the Stock Market Hits "Extreme Fear"
summary: The wrong market environment can really get in your head and lead you to make ill-advised decisions. You'll want to be proactive about combatting this risk.

raw.headline: 3 Important Reminders for Investors When the Stock Market Hits "Extreme Fear"
raw.summary: The wrong market environment can really get in your head and lead you to make ill-advised decisions. You'll want to be proactive about combatting this risk.

headline: Prediction market bets on sports, election, war would be verboten under new legislation
summary: Lawmakers have introduced a flurry of measures to rein-in prediction markets in recent weeks, as the platforms have come under increased scrutiny.
